summary: Comprehensive testing completed on MEXC Trading Bot. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend UI fully functional with professional dark theme, proper authentication, and all major features operational. Bot already has active paper trading position in GOLD(XAUT)USDT.
